tools.name: what_supports
tools.description: Edges asserting or indicating that something SUPPORTS the given work or claim.

tools.name: what_refutes
tools.description: Edges asserting or indicating that something REFUTES the given work or claim.

tools.name: what_cites
tools.description: Works or claims that CITE the given identifier (incoming citations).

tools.name: references_of
tools.description: What the given work CITES (its outgoing references).

tools.name: edges_about
tools.description: Every edge touching the given work or claim, in either direction, each tagged with its trust tier (asserted|inferred) and attribution/provenance.
